mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_form ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_form WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%' ORDER BY created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_risk_assessment_form WHERE title LIKE '%' + #{title} + '%'
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_assessment_form ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_assessment_form SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, mod_user = #{modUser}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
